name: Apifox MCP Server
what_it_does: Official Apifox MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Apifox — the API design, testing, and documentation platform popular in the Chinese developer ecosystem — querying API specifications, retrieving endpoint documentation, searching API projects, accessing mock data configurations, and integrating Apifox's API management into agent-driven API development workflows.
use_cases: Retrieving API specifications and endpoint docs from API development agents
Searching Apifox projects for API definitions from documentation agents
Accessing mock server configurations from API testing agents
Integrating Apifox API specs into code generation workflows
Querying team API collections from collaboration agents
Extracting API schemas for agent-driven test case generation
not_for: Postman, Insomnia, or other API tool users (different tools)
Teams without Apifox account (popular in China, less common elsewhere)
API testing execution (MCP provides access to specs, not test runners)
best_when: A development team using Apifox for API design needs AI-assisted API spec retrieval and documentation — particularly common in Chinese tech organizations where Apifox is widely adopted.
avoid_when: You use Postman, Swagger UI, or other API tools — or are outside the Apifox ecosystem.

auth.notes: Apifox personal access token required. Generate from Apifox account settings. Tokens provide access to user's projects and team projects.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Apifox: free tier with limited team features
pricing.notes: Apifox has a free tier for individual developers. Team features require paid plans. Official MCP from Apifox team.

performance.rate_limits: Apifox API: rate limits apply per account tier

known_agent_gotchas: Apifox is most popular in China — English documentation may lag behind Chinese docs
Project and folder IDs needed for most operations — retrieve project list first
API spec format is Apifox's own format (superset of OpenAPI) — not pure OpenAPI
Official Apifox MCP — higher quality than average for Chinese dev tool integrations
Data residency may be in China for accounts created on Chinese platform
Rate limits vary by subscription tier — check plan before heavy usage
agent_readiness.security_notes: Personal access token. HTTPS enforced. Official Apifox MCP. Data may reside in China. Store token in env var. China data regulations may apply.

security_score_components.security_notes: API key auth. HTTPS. Official Apifox MCP. China data residency possible. Store token securely.
